mapper.select: SELECT la.application_id AS applicationId, la.user_id AS userId, su.real_name AS userName, su.phone AS userPhone, lp.product_name AS productName, la.apply_amount AS applyAmount, la.apply_term AS applyTerm, la.application_status AS applicationStatus, CASE la.application_status WHEN 'pending' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'approved' THEN '审核通过' WHEN 'rejected' THEN '拒绝' WHEN 'supplement' THEN '需补充材料' WHEN 'issued' THEN '已放款' ELSE '未知状态' END AS statusDesc, la.apply_time AS applyTime, la.contract_status AS contractStatus, la.contract_path AS contractPath, la.sign_time AS signTime, la.stamp_time AS stampTime FROM loan_application la LEFT JOIN loan_product lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON la.user_id = su.user_id WHERE la.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY la.apply_time DESC

SELECT application_id AS applicationId, user_id AS userId, product_id AS productId, apply_amount AS applyAmount, apply_term AS applyTerm, application_status AS applicationStatus, credit_score AS creditScore, scorecard_score AS scorecardScore, disbursement_card_id AS disbursementCardId, apply_time AS applyTime, update_time AS updateTime,
contract_status AS contractStatus, contract_path AS contractPath, contract_hash AS contractHash, sign_time AS signTime, stamp_time AS stampTime FROM loan_application WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
SELECT apply_amount FROM loan_application WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
SELECT interest_rate FROM loan_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT la.application_id AS applicationId, la.user_id AS userId, su.real_name AS userName, su.phone AS userPhone, lp.product_name AS productName, la.apply_amount AS applyAmount, la.apply_term AS applyTerm, la.application_status AS applicationStatus, CASE la.application_status WHEN 'pending' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'approved' THEN '审核通过' WHEN 'rejected' THEN '拒绝' WHEN 'supplement' THEN '需补充材料' WHEN 'issued' THEN '已放款' ELSE '未知状态' END AS statusDesc, la.apply_time AS applyTime FROM loan_application la LEFT JOIN loan_product lp ON la.product_id = lp.product_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON la.user_id = su.user_id WHERE la.application_status = 'approved' ORDER BY la.apply_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE loan_application SET contract_path = #{path}, contract_hash = #{hash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE loan_application SET contract_status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE loan_application SET contract_hash = #{hash}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
